title: Lava/Water Bucket Colour
description: When Water Is In A Bucket, The Bucket Turns Blue. When Lava Is In A Bucket, The Bucket Turns Red/Orange. Very Useful For UHC!
body: Makes it so that when there is lava inside the bucket, the buckets turn orange/red. When there is water, it makes it go blue. This is very useful for UHC.
